---
title: "Final_Project_Code"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup}
      knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("/home1/emmashih/490_cluster/analysis_data")) 
```

```{r}
library(TCGAbiolinks)
library(maftools)
```

```{r}
clin_query <- GDCquery(project = "TCGA-SKCM",
data.category = "Clinical",
data.type = "Clinical Supplement",
data.format = 'SKCM Biotab')
# GDCdownload(clin_query)
clinical.BCRtab.all <- GDCprepare(clin_query)
clinicSKCM <- clinical.BCRtab.all$clinical_patient_skcm[-c(1,2),]
```
